value.install_method: Provides dbus/shm_tree/shared_memory.h with shm::shared_memory::ipmi_match() and shm::shared_memory_base::_ipmi_cmd_list. NOT available via apt.

execution_log.note: Docker Hub unreachable, used domestic mirror

execution_log.command: apt-get install -y meson ninja-build g++ gcc git libdbus-1-dev libglib2.0-dev libgtest-dev libboost-all-dev libsqlite3-dev liblua5.3-dev lua5.3

execution_log.error: filter.h uses shm::shared_memory::ipmi_match() and shm::shared_memory_base::_ipmi_cmd_list which are not in mock_shm.h (only provided by conan libsomp)

process_timeline.action: Read README.md, meson.build, meson_options.txt, conanfile.py, subproject files
Pull Ubuntu 24.04 (domestic mirror) and start container
Install build deps (switched to Aliyun mirror for apt)
Configure Lua 5.3 symlinks, stub headers in /usr/include
Configure meson with lua_root and cpp_args

failure_details.error: 'class shm::shared_memory' has no member named 'ipmi_match'; 'struct shm::shared_memory_base' has no member named '_ipmi_cmd_list'

build.note: Build incomplete. 5 targets fail due to missing conan-provided shm API members.

ut.note: Test executable libipmi_test failed to compile (test_filters.cpp.o depends on filter.h which uses missing shm API)

results.name: N/A
results.reason: No executable sample programs in repository. README only provides Lua API usage examples.

documentation_gaps: No Dockerfile provided - image selection required inference from apt usage in README
sqlite3 dependency not documented in README - only found in libmcpp/mcdatabase subproject meson.build
libmcpp subproject dependency mechanism not clearly explained - wrap-git uses SSH which requires authentication
No sample/example executable programs documented - only Lua API usage examples
No information about skynet/libsomp conan package requirement for dbus/shm_tree/shared_memory.h header
Lua version requirements unclear - README mentions LuaJIT 2.1.0 compatibility but subproject code uses Lua 5.2+ API functions
No documentation on how to perform pure meson builds (non-conan) - the meson build path assumes conan-provided headers are available
README build instructions (meson setup builddir) are incomplete - require additional system headers not provided by apt packages

problems_encountered.problem: libsqlite3-dev not installed - implicit dependency of libmcpp/mcdatabase subproject
shm::shared_memory::ipmi_match() method missing - filter.h calls this method but mock_shm.h does not provide it
problems_encountered.solution: Cannot fix without modifying source code. This member is only provided by conan libsomp's shared_memory implementation.
problems_encountered.status: UNRESOLVED - requires source modification or conan environment

problems_encountered.problem: shm::shared_memory_base::_ipmi_cmd_list member missing - filter.h accesses this struct but mock_shm.h does not define it
problems_encountered.solution: Cannot fix without modifying source code. This struct is only provided by conan libsomp's shared_memory_base implementation.
problems_encountered.status: UNRESOLVED - requires source modification or conan environment

conclusion.summary: The libipmi repository cannot be fully built in a plain Ubuntu 24.04 Docker container using only apt packages and meson. ~370/375 targets build successfully (all libmcpp subproject libraries), but 5 targets fail due to conan-provided shared memory API members.
conclusion.root_cause: The top-level libipmi code (filter.h) has a direct dependency on conan-provided dbus/shm_tree/shared_memory.h types that are not available in the pure meson build path.
